name: 能量形式
subject: inquiry
domain_name: 物理世界 / Physical World / Physical World
curriculum_points: Students in PYP 3-5 will be able to identify different forms of energy (e.g., heat, light, kinetic, chemical) and provide examples of energy transfer and transformation in simple systems.
